args: docker kill shard-mcp 2>/dev/null; docker rm shard-mcp 2>/dev/null; cd "$PWD/app" && npm run dev >/dev/null 2>&1 & exec docker run --rm -i --name shard-mcp -p 7777:8080 -v "$PWD/.shards:/root/.shards" -e HOME=/root -e SHARD_KEY=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f --entrypoint /bin/bash shard -c '/app/shard --mcp'
